title: UltimateBlissSMP
description: A recreation of minecraft Bliss SMP feature into plugin.....
body:
✦ UltimateBliss ✦

 The Ultimate Gem Power System for Paper 1.21.x

UltimateBliss is a comprehensive class-based power system plugin for Minecraft servers running Paper 1.21.1 - 1.21.11.

Choose from **8 unique Gems**, each granting powerful passive effects and active abilities. Gain Energy through combat, evolve your Gem through multiple tiers, unlock new powers, and become one of the strongest players on your server.

---

 ✨ Features

* 8 Unique Gem Classes
* 4 Abilities Per Gem
* Dynamic Energy System
* 3-Tier Progression System
* Custom Upgrade Items
* Animated GUI Menus
* Persistent Player Data
* Fully Configurable
* Particle & Sound Effects
* Paper 1.21.x Support

---

 ⚡ The Gem System

Every player possesses a Gem that determines their abilities and playstyle.

Players can:

* Unlock powerful skills
* Progress through tiers
* Gain and lose Energy
* Upgrade and repair Gems
* Customize their gameplay style

---

 🔮 Available Gems

 ⚡ Flux Gem

Master electrical energy and lightning.

 Abilities

* Flashbang
* Flux Beam
* Ground
* Kinetic Burst

 Passives

* Flow State
* Conduction
* Tireless
* Shocking Chance

---

 🔥 Fire Gem

Harness the destructive power of flames.

 Abilities

* Fireball
* Crisp
* Blaze Aura
* Inferno

 Passives

* Fire Resistance
* Ember Trail
* Heat Aura
* Burning Strikes

---

 🗡 Astra Gem

Stealth, assassination and shadow manipulation.

 Abilities

* Dagger Throw
* Invisibility
* Phase
* Shadow Step

 Passives

* Night Vision
* Shadow Cloak
* Backstab

---

 💚 Life Gem

Healing, support and vitality.

 Abilities

* Health Share
* Heart Lock
* Regeneration Burst
* Lifesteal Aura

 Passives

* Natural Regeneration
* Life Sense
* Vitality

---

 🌬 Puff Gem

Air manipulation and mobility.

 Abilities

* Double Jump
* Cloud Dash
* Updraft
* Tornado

 Passives

* Feather Fall
* Air Cushion
* Glide

---

 ⚡ Speed Gem

Lightning-fast movement and reflexes.

 Abilities

* Lightning Strike
* Speed Boost
* Dash
* Time Slow

 Passives

* Swift
* Quick Reflexes
* Momentum

---

 💪 Strength Gem

Raw power and tracking abilities.

 Abilities

* Bounty Tracker
* Nullify
* Power Strike
* Iron Skin

 Passives

* Titan
* Armor Piercing
* Heavy Hitter
* Combo Damage

---

 💰 Wealth Gem

Fortune, storage and item protection.

 Abilities

* Virtual Pocket
* Item Lock
* Fortune Boost
* Midas Touch

 Passives

* Fortune
* Miser
* Greed

---

 ⚡ Energy System

Energy directly affects your Gem's power.

| Energy | State       | Power    |
| ------ | ----------- | -------- |
| 10     | Pristine +5 | 150%     |
| 9      | Pristine +4 | 140%     |
| 8      | Pristine +3 | 130%     |
| 7      | Pristine +2 | 120%     |
| 6      | Pristine +1 | 110%     |
| 5      | Pristine    | 100%     |
| 4      | Scratched   | 90%      |
| 3      | Cracked     | 80%      |
| 2      | Shattered   | 70%      |
| 1      | Ruined      | 50%      |
| 0      | Broken      | Disabled |

 Gain Energy

* Kill Players
* Use Reparation Shards
* Use Reparation Pedestals

 Lose Energy

* Die to another player

 Broken Gems

At 0 Energy:

* All abilities disabled
* All passives disabled
* Must be repaired

---

 ⬆ Tier Progression

Progress your Gem through three powerful stages.

| Tier | Name       |
| ---- | ---------- |
| I    | Apprentice |
| II   | Adept      |
| III  | Master     |

 Unlocks

| Tier | Abilities |
| ---- | --------- |
| I    | 2         |
| II   | 3         |
| III  | 4         |

 Upgrade Path

```text
Tier I
   ↓
Gem Upgrader
   ↓
Tier II
   ↓
Gem Polisher
   ↓
Tier III
```

---

 🧰 Custom Items

 Gem Upgrader

Upgrade Tier I → Tier II

 Gem Polisher

Upgrade Tier II → Tier III

 Gem Trader

Reroll your Gem type while keeping Tier and Energy.

 Reparation Shard

Restore +1 Energy.

 Reparation Pedestal

Restore +5 Energy.

---

 🖥 Commands

 Player Commands

```text
/bliss
/bliss help
/bliss info
/bliss select
/bliss trade
/bliss abilities
/bliss energy
```

 Admin Commands

```text
/blissadmin give
/blissadmin remove
/blissadmin settier
/blissadmin setenergy
/blissadmin repair
/blissadmin giveitem
/blissadmin info
/blissadmin reload
```

---

 🔑 Permissions

 Player Permissions

```text
ultimatebliss.use
ultimatebliss.command.info
ultimatebliss.command.select
ultimatebliss.command.trade
```

 Admin Permissions

```text
ultimatebliss.admin
ultimatebliss.admin.give
ultimatebliss.admin.remove
ultimatebliss.admin.reload
```

---

 ⚙ Configuration

UltimateBliss is fully configurable.

Customize:

* Cooldowns
* Messages
* Recipes
* Effects
* Sounds
* Energy Values
* Gem Settings

---

 📦 Requirements

* Paper 1.21.1+
* Java 21

---

 🎨 Resource Pack

The official UltimateBliss resource pack is available through our Discord server:

https://discord.com/invite/ZNAv5KWM7q

---

 📥 Installation

1. Download UltimateBliss.jar
2. Place it inside your `/plugins` folder
3. Start the server
4. Configure generated files
5. Restart the server

---

 ❤️ Support

Need help, want to report a bug, or suggest a feature?

Join the Discord:

https://discord.com/invite/ZNAv5KWM7q

---

 ✨ UltimateBliss

Choose your Gem. Gain Energy. Evolve your Power.
